description: Maps Pattern Lexicon entries to executable Cognitive Bytecode for frontier LLM deployment

stage_1_parse.name: Pattern Activation Parser
stage_1_parse.process: Embed task; compute cosine similarity to pattern embedding centroids; activate patterns where similarity > task_conditioned_baseline
stage_1_parse.output: Ordered list of activated PAT-IDs with confidence scores

stage_2_decorator_selection.name: PDL Bytecode Emitter
stage_2_decorator_selection.process: Map each pattern to mandatory PDL decorators; resolve decorator dependencies; topological sort by layer (Cognitive → Epistemic → Structural → Systemic)

stage_3_model_targeting.name: Pluriversal Guardrail Injector
stage_3_model_targeting.input: PDL decorator stack + target model identifier
stage_3_model_targeting.process: Apply model-specific wrapping (Twinning for Claude 4.6; EJM for Gemini 3.1; DFA logit-masking for GPT-5.3)
stage_3_model_targeting.output: Model-targeted execution prompt with embedded bytecode

stage_4_monitoring.name: Phronesis Index Monitor
stage_4_monitoring.process: Compute spectral gap of Connection Laplacian Φ continuously; trigger EpistemicEscrow if Φ < 0.05 or CFDI > 0.15
stage_4_monitoring.output: Execution health stream; Symbolic Scar minting on escrow trigger

ESCROW_CONTRADICTION.effect: Activates PAT-002 Paraconsistent Scarring; mints Symbolic Scar hypervector

LOCK_CONTEXT.effect: Injects +++ContextLock to prevent Workflow Narrowing Effect (PAT-003)

ISOLATE_TERM.effect: Activates PAT-007 Lexical Saponification mitigation via +++AutonymicIsolate

FORCE_ORTHOGONAL.effect: Activates PAT-006 Topological Orthogonality Hypothesis; deforms target latent manifold

SCAN_TDA.effect: Activates PAT-009 TDA Hallucination Detector; returns β₁ barcode lifetimes

GUARD_SCHEMA.effect: Injects +++DCCDSchemaGuard; prevents Projection Tax and Alignment Faking (PAT-004, PAT-005)

STIGMERGE_SWARM.effect: Activates PAT-008 Stigmergic Coordination; deploys STA + FIPI mechanisms

ROLLBACK.effect: Activates +++SagaRecovery; epistemic rollback to last verified Phronesis state
